text_block_list.text: I find some time to drop by the dance<n>studio...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right hand, left hand, step back! Raise<n>both hands
and swing them—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Sorry about that! Are you<n>okay?!
choice_data_list: All good. You're really getting into this.
All good. You're really getting into this.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I can't wait to take center<n>stage and put on
an awesome show<n>at my winning concert!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've been pumped up like crazy ever<n>since I saw
Dia's concert!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yep! Dia's incredible! She shines sobrilliantly on stage, you'd think shewas a real diamond!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: She's fearless, you know? And itreally shows in her performances!They even got me worked up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She's so effortlessly cool—I wanna<n>be able to
dance like her!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But when I start thinking about it all,<n>my head gets
all mixed up...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Advice... Yeah, good idea! I'll go ask<n>some of the
Umamusume I look up to!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...So please, Teio! I beg you! Tell me<n>the secret to
putting on an amazing<n>concert!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ho ho ho, this is my specialty!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, all right! Listen closely! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
First, let's get a video of you dancing!<n>We can do
it together!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I-I get to dance with you?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You there! Come on over and record<n>us with your
phone!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew, okay. Let's see how it turned<n>out... Hit play!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: N-next to you, it's super obvious howclumsy I am. This is soembarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mm... I'm not sure clumsiness is the<n>issue here.
I'd say it's something<n>more... basic?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Kita, you were focused entirely on me<n>while you
were dancing, weren't<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I... I was! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I like your honesty! But I<n>shouldn't be
your focus during a<n>concert, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, my favorite thing about<n>concerts is
when everyone tells me<n>how cool I am!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I used to shout about how cool Prezwas, and now I'm the onereceiving the cheers! Pretty amazing,huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always dance my heart<n>out! It's like,
"Check it out! I won! I'm<n>the best!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What about you? How do you feel<n>when you're
up on that stage?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: How do I feel? Well...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
At Teio's winning concerts, I used to<n>scream until
my voice went out...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And this time, there are going to bejust as many people cheering meon...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That makes me feel so... so...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...I get it now. Dia must have<n>understood this
feeling—that's why<n>she looked so awesome out
there.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Teio! I wanna put on a super cool<n>performance
that'll make the crowd<n>go wild!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Good, good. That's the first hurdle<n>cleared! Now
all you gotta do is put in<n>the work!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Right! Let's get back to practicing!

It looks like the idea of expressing<n>her feelings
through her performance<n>has helped Kitasan Black
make some<n>progress.
